venues.description: Named for the year The Walt Disney Company was founded, celebrating the golden age of Disney animation. Features California-inspired cuisine and walls adorned with over 1,000 drawings and props from the Walt Disney Animation Studios.

venues.name: Adventure Tea with Royalty
venues.description: An enchanting princess-hosted tea party experience with themed treats, storytelling, and royal meet-and-greets aboard the newer Disney ships.

venues.name: After Hours
venues.description: Villains-themed nightlife district with multiple themed areas for adults to enjoy cocktails, dancing, and entertainment. The vibrant heart of the ship's late-night scene.

venues.name: Alley Cat Café
venues.description: An Aristocats-inspired café serving pastries, sandwiches, and specialty coffee drinks in a charming Parisian cat-themed setting.

venues.name: Animator's Palate
venues.description: Interactive dining experience where the restaurant transforms from black-and-white to full color throughout the meal, featuring beloved Disney animation. On select sailings, guests can create drawings that come to life on screen.

venues.name: Animator's Table
venues.description: A fresh take on the Animator's Palate concept with next-generation interactive animation technology. Guests' creations come to life in new ways throughout an immersive dining experience.

venues.name: Arendelle: A Frozen Dining Adventure
venues.description: Immersive Frozen-themed dining with live performances by Elsa, Anna, Kristoff, and Olaf during your meal. Set during an engagement celebration in the kingdom of Arendelle with Nordic-inspired cuisine.

venues.name: Aurora Bar
venues.description: Northern lights-themed cocktail bar with a stunning ceiling that mimics the aurora borealis. Features Scandinavian-inspired cocktails and a magical atmosphere.

venues.name: Azure
venues.description: Live entertainment venue featuring contemporary music, dancing, and special events in a vibrant atmosphere.

venues.name: Bacha Coffee
venues.description: Premium coffee house offering an exceptional selection of rare and fine coffees from around the world, paired with elegant pastries and light bites.

venues.name: Beach Blanket Buffet
venues.description: Casual buffet restaurant that served as the predecessor to Cabanas on the Magic and Wonder. Offered a wide variety of breakfast and lunch options.

venues.name: Beverage Tastings
venues.description: Guided tasting experiences featuring craft cocktails, wines, whiskeys, and other premium beverages offered in various venues across the fleet.

venues.name: Bewitching Boba and Brews
venues.description: Specialty boba tea and brewed beverage shop offering creative tea-based drinks with a magical twist.

venues.name: Bon Voyage
venues.description: Elegant atrium bar located in the stunning Grand Hall. Perfect for a cocktail while watching the atrium entertainment and the enchanted staircase show.

venues.name: Buccaneer Bar
venues.description: Pirate-themed bar serving tropical cocktails and rum-based drinks in a swashbuckling atmosphere.

venues.name: Cabanas
venues.description: Casual buffet-style restaurant with a wide variety of breakfast, lunch, and dinner options. Offers indoor and outdoor seating with ocean views and a relaxed poolside atmosphere.

venues.name: Cadillac Lounge
venues.description: Classic cocktail lounge celebrating the golden age of automobiles with vintage car-inspired decor and live music. A Wonder-exclusive adults retreat with a smooth, nostalgic vibe.

venues.name: Captain Pete's Boatload Brunch
venues.description: Character brunch experience featuring Mickey Mouse and friends in their captain's finest. Enjoy a special brunch menu while characters visit your table for photos and autographs.

venues.name: Carioca's
venues.description: The Three Caballeros-themed rotational dining celebrating the vibrant cultures of Latin America. Features a festive atmosphere and Latin American-inspired cuisine.

venues.name: Cask & Cannon
venues.description: A maritime-themed lounge with live entertainment, craft cocktails, and a warm nautical atmosphere.

venues.name: Character Breakfast
venues.description: Special character dining breakfast where Disney characters visit your table during a buffet-style meal. Available on select mornings during your sailing.

venues.name: Cookies BBQ (Castaway Cay)
venues.description: Open-air barbecue restaurant on Disney's private island Castaway Cay. Serves grilled burgers, ribs, chicken, corn on the cob, and tropical sides. Complimentary for all guests.

venues.name: Cosmic Kebabs
venues.description: Quick-service spot serving flavorful grilled kebabs and Mediterranean-inspired fare with a cosmic twist.

venues.name: Cove Bar
venues.description: Adults-only poolside bar adjacent to the Quiet Cove Pool. Serves tropical cocktails, frozen drinks, beer, wine, and non-alcoholic beverages in a relaxed outdoor setting.

venues.name: Cove Cafe
venues.description: Adults-only coffee bar and lounge serving specialty espresso drinks, pastries, cocktails, and wines. A peaceful retreat near the adult pool area, perfect for quiet mornings or relaxed evenings.

venues.name: Crown & Fin Pub
venues.description: British-style pub aboard the Wonder with a lively atmosphere, craft beers, pub fare, and sports viewing. A casual hangout with nautical British decor.

venues.name: Currents
venues.description: Open-air sports bar on the upper deck with views of the ocean and pool area. Shows live sports events and serves a full bar menu with snacks.

venues.name: D Lounge
venues.description: Family-friendly entertainment lounge hosting game shows, trivia, karaoke, family activities, and live performances throughout the day and evening.

venues.name: Daisy's De-Lites
venues.description: Poolside quick-service spot serving fresh wraps, salads, sandwiches, and seasonal fruit. A lighter alternative to the grill options available on the pool deck.

venues.name: De Vil's
venues.description: A glamorous Cruella de Vil-inspired lounge with live entertainment, signature cocktails, and daring black-and-white decor.

venues.name: District Lounge
venues.description: Sleek, modern lounge serving as the hub of the nightlife district. Features live music, signature cocktails, and a sophisticated contemporary atmosphere.

venues.name: Duck-In Diner
venues.description: Donald Duck-themed quick-service diner serving classic comfort food favorites including burgers, sandwiches, and fries.

venues.name: Edna À La Mode Sweets
venues.description: An Incredibles-themed dessert and sweets shop inspired by the fabulous Edna Mode. Features stylish confections, gelato, and specialty treats.

venues.name: Enchanté by Chef Arnaud Lallement
venues.description: Elegant fine dining featuring French-inspired tasting menus by a world-renowned chef. An intimate adults-only experience with impeccable service and exquisite cuisine.

venues.name: Enchanted Garden
venues.description: Versailles-inspired garden room that magically transforms from day to night during dinner with changing lighting, opening flower centerpieces, and a ceiling that shifts from blue sky to starlit night.

venues.name: Enchanted Summer Restaurant
venues.description: A summer celebration in Arendelle with lighter fare inspired by warm-weather Nordic cuisine. Features a bright, sun-drenched atmosphere celebrating summer in the kingdom.

venues.name: Evolution
venues.description: Modern nightclub and dance venue with a sleek atmosphere, live DJ sets, and themed dance parties.

venues.name: Eye Scream Treats
venues.description: Self-serve soft-serve ice cream station with various toppings. Available throughout the day — a sweet treat that's always free and always popular.

venues.name: Fathoms
venues.description: Nightclub and entertainment venue hosting live comedy shows, dance parties, and themed events.

venues.name: Flo's Cafe
venues.description: Cars-themed food court hub on the pool deck inspired by Flo's V8 Cafe from Radiator Springs. Multiple stations serve poolside favorites in a fun, automotive-themed setting.

venues.name: French Quarter Lounge
venues.description: New Orleans-inspired lounge with a warm, atmospheric setting serving cocktails and hosting live jazz.

venues.name: Frozone Treats
venues.description: Ice cream station named after the coolest superhero in The Incredibles. Serves soft-serve ice cream and frozen treats with a variety of toppings.

venues.name: Garden Bar
venues.description: A lush garden-themed bar offering refreshing cocktails, mocktails, and light bites in a relaxed botanical setting.

venues.name: Gaston's Tavern
venues.description: A lively pub inspired by Gaston's gathering spot from Beauty and the Beast. Serves hearty pub fare, craft beers, and signature LeFou's Brew in a boisterous tavern setting.

venues.name: Gramma Tala's Kitchen
venues.description: Moana-inspired quick-service dining featuring Polynesian-inspired cuisine. Named after Moana's wise grandmother Tala.

venues.name: Haunted Mansion Parlor
venues.description: A Haunted Mansion-inspired lounge filled with supernatural surprises, ghostly cocktails, and eerie elegance.

venues.name: Hollywood Spotlight Club
venues.description: A glamorous tribute to Hollywood's golden age featuring classic American cuisine with a modern twist. Live entertainment and cinematic decor transport guests to the era of silver screen legends.

venues.name: Hook & Barrel
venues.description: Poolside grill serving burgers, grilled chicken, hot dogs, and other cookout favorites. A go-to lunch spot on sea days located near the family pool.

venues.name: Infinity Bar
venues.description: Poolside bar with an infinity-edge design offering cocktails, frozen drinks, and refreshments with ocean views.

venues.name: Inside Out: Joyful Garden Cafe
venues.description: Inside Out-themed quick-service cafe with healthy options, salads, wraps, and fresh juices. A colorful, emotion-filled dining environment near the kids' areas.

venues.name: Inside Out: Joyful Sweets
venues.description: Inside Out-themed dessert shop featuring colorful confections, gelato, and baked goods. Each treat is inspired by a different emotion from the film.

venues.name: Jumbeaux's Sweets Cafe
venues.description: Zootopia-themed rotational dining inspired by the famous ice cream parlor from the film. Features creative cuisine with oversized decor elements that make guests feel like they've shrunk down to the size of a mouse.

venues.name: Keg & Compass
venues.description: Viking-themed pub with nautical maps, compass details, and a warm tavern atmosphere. Offers craft beers, pub fare, and a cozy evening hangout vibe.

venues.name: Keys
venues.description: Sophisticated piano bar inspired by a classic jazz club with live piano music every evening. Features premium cocktails and an intimate atmosphere perfect for a nightcap.

venues.name: La Piazza
venues.description: Italian-inspired lounge and gathering space in the nightlife district with wine, cocktails, and a European café atmosphere.

venues.name: Lookout Cay Dining
venues.description: Open-air dining at Disney's Lookout Cay at Lighthouse Point. Features Bahamian-inspired cuisine including jerk chicken, conch fritters, and tropical sides in a vibrant island setting.

venues.name: Lumiere's
venues.description: Elegant French-inspired rotational dining named after the charming candelabra from Beauty and the Beast. Features classic continental cuisine with ornate chandeliers, rich fabrics, and golden accents creating a truly regal atmosphere.

venues.name: Lumiere's Kitchen
venues.description: A premium version of Lumiere's concept featuring a chef's table experience with tasting menus. Intimate dining in the Beast's private kitchen.

venues.name: Luna
venues.description: Sophisticated lounge with live entertainment, signature cocktails, and a magical evening ambiance.

venues.name: Luna's Festive Foods
venues.description: Coco-themed quick-service station offering Mexican-inspired snacks and treats. Features colorful festive decor inspired by the Land of the Dead celebrations.

venues.name: Marceline Market
venues.description: Food hall-style marketplace named after Walt Disney's childhood hometown of Marceline, Missouri. Features diverse food stations offering everything from pizza to Asian cuisine to fresh pastries.

venues.name: Market Bar
venues.description: Casual bar located in the market dining area offering cocktails, wine, beer, and refreshing beverages.

venues.name: Meridian
venues.description: Sophisticated cocktail lounge with artisan cocktails, premium spirits, and a refined ambiance. Located near the specialty dining restaurants, making it perfect for a pre-dinner drink.

venues.name: Mickey & Friends Festival of Foods
venues.description: Outdoor food court area on the upper decks with multiple quick-service windows. A central hub for poolside dining with options for every taste.

venues.name: Mickey's Pool Bar
venues.description: Poolside quick service serving burgers, hot dogs, chicken tenders, and refreshing beverages. The go-to spot for grabbing a bite between pool sessions.

venues.name: Mike and Sulley's Flavors of Asia
venues.description: Monsters, Inc.-themed Asian quick-service restaurant offering noodles, stir-fry, sushi, and other Pan-Asian favorites.

venues.name: Mowgli's Eatery
venues.description: Jungle Book-inspired eatery serving fresh, vibrant dishes with Indian and Southeast Asian flavors.

venues.name: Navigator's Club
venues.description: Adventure-themed rotational dining celebrating the spirit of exploration with global cuisine. Features cartography-inspired decor and an atmosphere of maritime discovery.

venues.name: Nightingale's
venues.description: Upscale piano bar inspired by a secret speakeasy, with craft cocktails and live piano music. Features a hidden entrance and sophisticated ambiance for adults seeking an elegant evening.

venues.name: O'Gills Pub
venues.description: Irish-themed pub with a warm, convivial atmosphere named after a character from the Darby O'Gill films. Features draught beers, pub snacks, and live sports on screen.

venues.name: Olaf's Royal Picnic
venues.description: An exclusive Frozen-themed tea party hosted by Olaf. Young guests enjoy themed snacks, activities, and a surprise visit from Frozen characters. Advance reservation required.

venues.name: Ooh La La
venues.description: Elegant champagne bar inspired by the chic lounges of Paris, serving premium champagnes, wines, and cocktails.

venues.name: Outlook Bar
venues.description: Open-air bar at the stern of the ship offering sweeping ocean views and fresh breezes. Serves cocktails, wine, and light snacks in a breezy setting.

venues.name: Outlook Cafe
venues.description: A small, intimate cafe and wine bar located at the stern of the ship with sweeping ocean views. Serves specialty coffees, pastries, wines, and cocktails.

venues.name: P&J Cantina
venues.description: Lilo & Stitch-inspired tropical tiki bar serving exotic cocktails and Hawaiian-inspired drinks. Features fun tiki decor and a laid-back island party atmosphere.

venues.name: Palo
venues.description: The original DCL specialty restaurant since 1998, serving Northern Italian cuisine with stunning ocean views. Offers both brunch and dinner seatings. Named after the Venetian mooring poles.

venues.name: Palo Café
venues.description: A casual Italian café extension of the Palo brand offering espresso, pastries, paninis, and light Italian fare throughout the day.

venues.name: Palo Steakhouse
venues.description: Premium steakhouse evolution of the classic Palo concept. Features fine cuts of steak with Italian influences, handmade pasta, and ocean views in an elegant adults-only setting.

venues.name: Palo Trattoria
venues.description: An upscale Italian trattoria offering a refined take on classic Italian cuisine. A premium adults-only dining experience in the Palo family.

venues.name: Parrot Cay
venues.description: Caribbean-themed rotational dining with tropical decor, lush greenery, and a relaxed island atmosphere. Features a blend of Caribbean and American cuisine.

venues.name: Periscope Pub
venues.description: Nautical-themed pub with craft beers, pub fare, and a maritime explorer atmosphere.

venues.name: Perla de Coco
venues.description: Coco-inspired lounge celebrating the vibrant world of the Land of the Dead. Features festive cocktails, live entertainment, and colorful decor inspired by the beloved Pixar film.

venues.name: Pete's Boiler Bites
venues.description: Steamboat-themed quick-service spot serving snacks, bites, and quick meals on the pool deck.

venues.name: Pink: Wine and Champagne Bar
venues.description: Chic pink-hued champagne and wine bar serving premium bubbly, rosé wines, and sparkling cocktails.

venues.name: Pinocchio's Pizzeria
venues.description: Classic pizza spot serving personal-sized pies with a variety of toppings. A popular late-night option that's often open until midnight.

venues.name: Pixar Market Restaurant
venues.description: Colorful market-style rotational dining celebrating the world of Pixar. Features culinary creations inspired by beloved Pixar films in a lively, festive setting.

venues.name: Pizza Planet
venues.description: Toy Story-inspired pizza restaurant serving personal pizzas with a variety of toppings in a fun, arcade-inspired atmosphere.

venues.name: Plaza de Coco
venues.description: Vibrant Coco-themed restaurant celebrating the Land of the Dead with Mexican-inspired cuisine and live music. Features colorful papel picado, marigold decorations, and performances inspired by the film.

venues.name: Pluto's Dog House
venues.description: Quick-service window serving hot dogs, bratwursts, and sausages with assorted toppings. A classic cruise snack spot perfect for poolside munching.

venues.name: Preludes
venues.description: Pre-show cocktail bar located near the Walt Disney Theatre. Perfect for a drink before the evening's Broadway-style entertainment.

venues.name: Pride Lands: Feast of The Lion King
venues.description: A Lion King-themed rotational dining experience that transports guests to the Pride Lands. Features African-inspired cuisine and immersive entertainment celebrating the Circle of Life.

venues.name: Promenade Lounge
venues.description: Relaxed lounge along the promenade deck with ocean views, live music, and a full bar. A great spot for people-watching and casual drinks.

venues.name: Pub 687
venues.description: Named after Walt Disney's original Burbank studio address, this classic pub offers craft beers, cocktails, and a relaxed atmosphere for sports viewing and socializing.

venues.name: Rapunzel's Royal Table
venues.description: Tangled-themed dining with live entertainment featuring Flynn Rider and the Snuggly Duckling Thugs performing musical numbers. Enjoy German-inspired cuisine in a festive atmosphere inspired by the kingdom of Corona.

venues.name: Remy
venues.description: Ratatouille-inspired premium French restaurant offering multi-course tasting menus crafted with the finest ingredients. The most upscale dining experience on the Dream and Fantasy class ships.

venues.name: Room Service
venues.description: 24-hour complimentary room service delivered to your stateroom. Continental breakfast is available on a door-hanger order, and a full menu is available by phone throughout the day and evening.

venues.name: Route 66
venues.description: Cars-themed nightlife area with multiple lounges and bars. Features a fun, Route 66-inspired atmosphere with live entertainment and themed cocktails.

venues.name: Royal Court
venues.description: Elegant princess-themed dining room celebrating the stories of Cinderella, Snow White, Belle, and Aurora. Features beautiful artwork and a regal atmosphere with French-inspired cuisine.

venues.name: Royal Court Lounge
venues.description: An elegant royal-themed lounge offering refined cocktails and a regal atmosphere.

venues.name: Royal Court Royal Tea
venues.description: An enchanting princess-hosted tea party with themed treats, storytelling, and princess meet-and-greets. Children receive a princess gift set. Advance reservation required.

venues.name: Royal Palace
venues.description: Regal Cinderella-inspired dining room with classic fairy tale elegance, French-influenced cuisine, and stunning decor featuring glass slipper details and ornate ballroom styling.

venues.name: Royal Society for Friendship and Tea
venues.description: An elegant tea party experience celebrating friendship and Disney royalty. Features themed treats, fine teas, and character interactions.

venues.name: Saga
venues.description: Live entertainment lounge with themed shows, music performances, and signature cocktails.

venues.name: Sarabi
venues.description: Lion King-inspired lounge named after Simba's mother, featuring African-inspired cocktails and live entertainment.

venues.name: Scat Cat Lounge
venues.description: Aristocats-inspired jazz lounge with live music performances, craft cocktails, and a New Orleans jazz club atmosphere.

venues.name: Scoops
venues.description: Premium ice cream shop serving hand-scooped ice cream, sundaes, and specialty frozen treats. Available for an extra charge with a rotating selection of flavors.

venues.name: Serenity Bay BBQ (Castaway Cay)
venues.description: Adults-only barbecue area on the secluded Serenity Bay beach at Castaway Cay. Serves the same great BBQ as Cookies but in a tranquil, adults-only setting.

venues.name: Shiki
venues.description: Japanese-inspired specialty dining offering sushi, sashimi, and teppanyaki-style cuisine. Features elegant Japanese decor and premium sake selections.

venues.name: Signals
venues.description: Main pool deck bar serving cocktails, frozen drinks, beer, and specialty beverages. Conveniently located by the family pool for easy access while enjoying deck activities.

venues.name: Silk Road
venues.description: Asian-inspired quick-service dining featuring sushi, noodles, and Pan-Asian cuisine. A fresh dining option available on the pool deck.

venues.name: Skipper Society
venues.description: Jungle Cruise-inspired lounge with explorer-themed decor, craft cocktails, and witty entertainment.

venues.name: Skyline
venues.description: Unique bar with floor-to-ceiling digital windows showing cityscapes from around the world that change throughout the evening.

venues.name: Snack Shack
venues.description: Quick snack window near the pool deck serving popcorn, pretzels, nachos, and other snacks throughout the day. A convenient grab-and-go spot.

venues.name: Soul Cat Lounge
venues.description: Live entertainment lounge featuring soul, R&B, and jazz performances in a hip, intimate setting.

venues.name: Spellbound
venues.description: Enchanting lounge with a magical atmosphere, specialty cocktails, and mystical theming.

venues.name: Springtime Terrace
venues.description: Fresh-air dining terrace with a farm-to-table inspired menu featuring seasonal salads, grain bowls, and fresh juices. A healthy dining option with garden views.

venues.name: Star Wars: Hyperspace Lounge
venues.description: Immersive lounge set aboard a Star Wars starcruiser with a viewport showing hyperspace travel across the galaxy. Features themed cocktails and a unique galactic atmosphere. Ticketed entry required for certain time slots.

venues.name: Stitch's Ohana Grill
venues.description: Lilo & Stitch-themed grill serving Hawaiian-inspired favorites including grilled meats, poke bowls, and tropical sides.

venues.name: Sulley's Sips
venues.description: Monsters, Inc.-themed smoothie and juice bar serving fresh-blended smoothies, juices, and frozen beverages. Located near the family pool area.

venues.name: Sweet on You
venues.description: Artisan gelato and candy shop featuring hand-crafted gelato, bespoke chocolates, cupcakes, and confections. Premium desserts are available for an extra charge.

venues.name: Taverna Portorosso
venues.description: Luca-inspired Italian seaside taverna serving wine, cocktails, and light Italian bites in a charming Portorosso setting.

venues.name: The Bayou
venues.description: Princess and the Frog-themed lounge with a Louisiana bayou atmosphere, craft cocktails, and live jazz. Located adjacent to Tiana's Place.

venues.name: The District
venues.description: Adult entertainment district featuring multiple themed venues for cocktails, dancing, and nightlife. The social hub of the Dream and Fantasy after dark.

venues.name: The Rose
venues.description: Beauty and the Beast-inspired lounge and wine bar offering premium wines, champagnes, and a curated menu of small plates. An elegant pre-dinner or after-dinner retreat.

venues.name: The Sanctum
venues.description: A mysterious, immersive lounge with live entertainment and craft cocktails in a dark, atmospheric setting inspired by the Sanctum Sanctorum.

venues.name: The Tube
venues.description: Mod London-inspired nightclub with a vibrant British Invasion theme, dancing, and themed party nights.

venues.name: Tiana's Bayou Lounge
venues.description: Princess and the Frog-inspired lounge with a Louisiana bayou atmosphere and jazz-influenced cocktails.

venues.name: Tiana's Place
venues.description: Princess Tiana's New Orleans jazz club brought to life with Cajun and Creole-inspired cuisine, live jazz performances, and a visit from Princess Tiana herself. The most immersive rotational restaurant on any Disney ship.

venues.name: Tide Bar
venues.description: Family pool deck bar serving frozen cocktails, mocktails, smoothies, and other refreshing beverages. Conveniently located for easy access from the pool.

venues.name: Tiffins Talks & Tastes
venues.description: Premium dining experience offering world-inspired tasting menus with wine pairings. An intimate venue celebrating global culinary traditions.

venues.name: Topside Bar & Grill
venues.description: Pool deck quick-service spot serving classic American grill fare including burgers, chicken strips, hot dogs, and fries. Open for lunch on sea days.

venues.name: Tot's Play Cafe
venues.description: Toy Story-themed family cafe near the kids' play areas. Serves kid-friendly favorites and has an attached play space for toddlers.

venues.name: Triton Lounge
venues.description: Sophisticated lounge offering craft cocktails, premium spirits, and a refined maritime atmosphere with subtle Little Mermaid theming.

venues.name: Triton's
venues.description: Under-the-sea themed dining inspired by The Little Mermaid with elegant oceanic decor. Features a stunning mosaic of Ariel and intricate deep-sea details creating a magical undersea atmosphere.

venues.name: TWG Tea
venues.description: Luxury tea salon offering an extensive collection of fine teas from around the world, paired with elegant pastries and tea-time treats.

venues.name: Vanellope's Sweets & Treats
venues.description: Wreck-It Ralph themed dessert shop with artisan gelato, hand-decorated candy apples, and specialty confections. A fun, pixel-art themed environment.

venues.name: Vista Café
venues.description: Quick-service coffee bar located in the main atrium serving specialty coffees, teas, pastries, and light bites. A convenient grab-and-go option for morning caffeine.

venues.name: Wayfinder Bar
venues.description: Poolside bar with a Moana-inspired wayfinding theme, serving tropical cocktails and refreshments with ocean views.

venues.name: Wheezy's Freezies
venues.description: Toy Story-themed frozen treats station named after the lovable penguin toy Wheezy. Serves soft-serve ice cream, frozen beverages, and specialty frozen treats.

venues.name: Wishing Star Cafe
venues.description: Wish-inspired quick-service cafe serving fresh sandwiches, salads, and baked goods. A charming spot for a lighter meal with wishing star decor.

venues.name: Wonderland Tea Party
venues.description: A whimsical Alice in Wonderland-themed tea party for children featuring themed treats, crafts, and a surprise visit from characters. An enchanting experience down the rabbit hole.

venues.name: Worlds of Marvel
venues.description: Marvel Cinematic Universe themed dining with an interactive Avengers storyline that unfolds throughout dinner. Features quantum core technology and special effects that bring the MCU to life around you.

venues.name: Zenith
venues.description: Premium rooftop-style lounge on the upper deck offering craft cocktails, small plates, and panoramic ocean views. A sophisticated venue for sunset drinks.
